entities.name: Careerspan
entities.context: V's company that analyzes candidate inputs into ~40 pages of underlying analysis

entities.name: AI
entities.context: Handles question selection and extracts structured information from candidates

entities.name: Candidates
entities.context: Job seekers who go through structured conversation process instead of uploading resumes

entities.name: Recruiter
entities.context: Publishes jobs and uses employer portal to review applicants

entities.name: Hiring Manager
entities.context: Uses employer portal to evaluate candidates through narrative summaries

entities.name: Employer Portal
entities.context: Interface where recruiters/hiring managers review candidates and see narrative summaries

entities.name: Structured Conversation Process
entities.context: Application method that raises bar for seriousness and quality by requiring active engagement

entities.name: Narrative Fragments
entities.context: Reusable story components candidates build for interviews

entities.name: Talking Points Bank
entities.context: Collection of prepared points candidates can bring into interviews

relationships.context: Candidates interact with Careerspan to explore fit for roles
Careerspan employs AI to handle question selection and extraction
AI extracts structured information from candidate responses
Recruiters access candidate information through the portal
Hiring managers review candidates via the portal
Portal surfaces Careerspan's analysis output for employers
Core application method employed by Careerspan
Candidates build reusable interview preparation materials
Candidates develop story components for interviews
